title.es: Bucle Básico de Agente de Inventario con IA

description.en: Build a FastAPI inventory API with CSV persistence and a Python AI agent that uses tool calling to update stock, answer low-inventory questions, and log each loop event in conversation_log.csv.
description.es: Construye una API de inventario con FastAPI y persistencia en CSV, junto con un agente de IA en Python que use tool calling para actualizar stock, responder consultas de inventario bajo y registrar cada evento del bucle en conversation_log.csv.

sharing.en: I just completed AI basic Inventory Agent Loop with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-engineering-syllabus/tree/main/content/projects/ai-basic-inventory-agent-loop #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #python #fastapi #toolcalling
